title: What You Can Build
description: See real-world documents generated with OfficeIMO and PSWriteOffice.

cards.title: Automated Sales Report
cards.description: Complete Word document with formatted tables, charts, headers, footers, and table of contents generated from database queries.

cards.title: Financial Dashboard
cards.description: Excel workbook with multiple sheets, pivot tables, conditional formatting, sparklines, and interactive charts.

cards.title: Quarterly Presentation
cards.description: PowerPoint deck with branded slides, data-driven charts, shape layouts, and speaker notes auto-generated from templates.

cards.title: Documentation Pipeline
cards.description: Markdown documents built with the fluent API, parsed into typed ASTs, and rendered to HTML for blog posts and release notes.
